creator: draco@marino.st
text:
The distfile of FlexGet-1.0.3273.tar.gz has been removed although many other (newer) versions exists at http://download.flexget.com/archive

Fix: 

1. Update port to newer version
2. Find another MASTER_SITE
3. Store distfile locally
4. Mark broken

#4 might be best for now as the maintainer seems to time out these days.
